title: Rewrite SendOnboardingRequestDialog for new schema with field/doc checklist
description: The current SendOnboardingRequestDialog inserts into the old `onboarding_requests` table and requires an `onboarding_type_id`. This must be rewritten to: (1) accept only a recipient email, (2) show a checklist of CATALOG_FIELDS to select, (3) show a checklist of CATALOG_DOCUMENT_TYPES to select, (4) insert a row into `share_requests` linked to the requester's company, (5) generate a unique token. The dialog should also call the email API after creation (TASK-9 adds Resend, but the dialog should call POST /api/send-invite — if the route doesn't exist yet, log a warning and continue). Callers that passed onboardingTypeId must be updated.
acceptanceCriteria: Dialog no longer accepts or requires onboardingTypeId prop
Dialog shows a field checklist rendered from CATALOG_FIELDS (18 items) using Checkbox components
Dialog shows a document checklist rendered from CATALOG_DOCUMENT_TYPES (8 items) using Checkbox components
At least one field OR one document must be selected to enable the Send button

On submit, a row is inserted into share_requests with: requester_company_id (from user's company), recipient_email, requested_fields[], requested_documents[], token (UUID), expires_at (30 days), status='pending'
After successful insert, the generated link {origin}/onboard/{token} is shown with a copy button
tsc reports no new type errors
Playwright screenshot confirms the checklist dialog renders correctly

steps.description: Read the current SendOnboardingRequestDialog and its callers
steps.details: Read src/components/dashboard/SendOnboardingRequestDialog.tsx in full. Grep for 'SendOnboardingRequestDialog' to find all callers. Note which props are passed so they can be removed.

steps.description: Rewrite the component props and state
steps.details: Remove the onboardingTypeId prop. Add internal state: selectedFields: FieldKey[] = [] and selectedDocuments: DocumentTypeKey[] = []. Import CATALOG_FIELDS, CATALOG_DOCUMENT_TYPES, FieldKey, DocumentTypeKey from '@/lib/catalog'. Import useAuth to get company.id for requester_company_id.

steps.description: Build the field and document checklist UI
steps.details: In the form body, render two sections: 'Information to request' and 'Documents to request'. Each section maps over CATALOG_FIELDS / CATALOG_DOCUMENT_TYPES and renders a Checkbox + label for each item. Checked state is managed by selectedFields/selectedDocuments arrays. Use grid-cols-2 layout for readability.

steps.description: Update the mutation to insert into share_requests
steps.details: Replace the supabase.from('onboarding_requests').insert() call with supabase.from('share_requests').insert({ requester_company_id: company.id, recipient_email: data.recipient_email, requested_fields: selectedFields, requested_documents: selectedDocuments, token: generateToken(), expires_at: expiresAt.toISOString(), status: 'pending' }). Import generateToken from '@/lib/utils'. Generate expires_at = now + 30 days.

steps.description: After creation, attempt to call POST /api/send-invite
steps.details: After the mutation succeeds, call fetch('/api/send-invite', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ recipientEmail, shareLink, requesterName: company.legal_name }) }). If the route returns a non-2xx response or throws, log a warning with console.warn but do not fail the flow — just show the link and a note that email sending failed.

steps.description: Update all callers to remove onboardingTypeId prop
steps.details: For each file that uses SendOnboardingRequestDialog, remove the onboardingTypeId prop and any related state (e.g. selectedOnboardingTypeId). Update the open/close handler if needed.

steps.description: Run tsc and lint, fix errors
steps.details: Run npx tsc --noEmit and npx eslint --fix on changed files. Fix all errors.

Start dev server. Navigate to the admin dashboard. Open the 'Send Request' dialog. Take screenshot .agent/screenshots/TASK-2-send-dialog.png. Verify checklist renders with catalog fields and document types.

technicalNotes: company object comes from useAuth() — ensure it's loaded before the dialog can submit
The UNIQUE constraint on share_requests.token means generateToken() must produce a UUID — confirm it does (it uses uuid)
Do not attempt to send email if /api/send-invite doesn't exist yet; the try/catch handles this gracefully
